summary: #539 whole-app recon: map every surface to files, enumerate the Lucide→Tabler worklist, audit shared primitives vs DESIGN.md

surfaces.name: create-habit-modal
surfaces.notes: Orchestrates shared form with tag/goal/sub-habit/reminder state and AI-suggest flow. Uses AppOverlay on web, BottomSheetModal on mobile. Dismiss guard confirms changes before closing.

surfaces.name: edit-habit-modal
surfaces.notes: Mirrors create-habit-modal but for editing existing habits. Same form orchestration and shared primitives.

surfaces.name: habit-detail-drawer
surfaces.notes: Full habit detail view with checklist, calendar, stats, reminders. Mobile uses withDrawerContentInset for bottom sheet styling.

surfaces.name: reschedule-sheet
surfaces.notes: Reschedule habit with AI suggestion cards. Simple sheet with minimal content.

surfaces.name: create-goal-modal
surfaces.notes: Goal creation with type selector, target fields, and deadline. Dismiss guard on dirty state.

surfaces.name: edit-goal-modal
surfaces.notes: Edit existing goal. Same structure as create but with populated form values.

surfaces.name: goal-detail-drawer
surfaces.notes: Full goal detail view with metrics, progress tracking, and action footer. Embeds EditGoalModal for inline editing.

surfaces.name: notification-detail-modal
surfaces.notes: Notification detail view with body copy and action buttons. Minimal chrome, no special form fields.

surfaces.name: feature-guide-drawer
surfaces.notes: Onboarding feature guide with tabbed sections (astra, connect, social, habits, goals, calendar, rewards, settings, notifications).

surfaces.name: referral-drawer
surfaces.notes: Referral stats, link copy, progress rows, and share CTA. Hero icon disc, mono link well, progress indicators.

surfaces.name: share-card-sheet
surfaces.notes: Recap share preview with period selector, recap fetch, branded ShareCard, and native share. Shows empty state via SatelliteGlyph.

surfaces.name: rail-drawer
surfaces.notes: Web-only. Right-side slide-in drawer for desktop breakpoint (768–1279px) showing contextual rail content. Distinct from cross-platform modals.

surfaces.name: tour-replay-modal
surfaces.notes: Tour replay modal with section list and step icons. Allows users to re-run onboarding tours.

surfaces.name: confirm-dialog
surfaces.notes: Generic confirmation dialog with danger/warning/success/info variants. Title + description + confirm/cancel pills. Handles focus management, keyboard trap, and overlay stacking on both platforms.

surfaces.name: create-api-key-modal
surfaces.notes: API key creation form with name input, scope checkboxes, and expiry toggle. Displays created key in mono font well.

surfaces.name: trial-expired-modal
surfaces.notes: Trial-expired upsell modal with crown hero, paused Pro features list, and upgrade CTAs. Async storage gating (seen-once). Web uses AppOverlay, mobile uses Modal for full-screen presentation.

surfaces.name: edit-name-sheet
surfaces.notes: Simple edit-name form used in profile. Validates name, handles submission via updateName (web) or apiClient (mobile). Mobile uses offline queue mutation.

surfaces.name: version-update-drawer
surfaces.notes: Mobile-only. App version update notification drawer.

surfaces.name: move-parent-dialog
surfaces.notes: Mobile-only. Dialog for moving a habit to a different parent in the hierarchy.

surfaces.name: confirm-dialogs (habit-specific)
surfaces.notes: Habit-specific confirmation dialogs (delete, duplicate, etc.). Specialized uses of the generic ConfirmDialog primitive.

sparklesUsages.context: Line 95: <Sparkles size={15} strokeWidth={1.8} ... /> - visual accent in Pro plan feature row marking premium features
Line 12: Icon = Sparkles as default export - default icon for generic info cards
Line 269: <Sparkles size={16} strokeWidth={1.9} ... /> - Astra AI disclosure marker in reschedule suggestions
Line 110: leading={<Sparkles size={18} strokeWidth={1.8} ... />} - leading icon for 'Ask Astra' action button
Line 273, 449: Sparkles as AI suggestion button icon in tag suggestions and habit tweaks
Line 39: <Sparkles size={18} strokeWidth={1.9} ... /> - gamification reward indicator
Line 36: astra: Sparkles - maps 'astra' notification type to Sparkles icon
Line 27: orbit: Sparkles - maps 'orbit' nav key to Sparkles icon
Line 42: leading={<Sparkles size={18} strokeWidth={1.8} ... />} - upgrade CTA leading icon
Line 18: astra: Sparkles - maps 'astra' notification type to Sparkles icon
Line 193: <Sparkles size={16} color={tokens.primarySoft} ... /> - Astra AI disclosure marker
Line 507: leading={<Sparkles size={18} color={tokens.fgOnPrimary} ... />} - Ask Astra button icon

Line 165: <Sparkles size={14} color={tokens.primary} ... /> - AI tag suggestion indicator
Line 37: <Sparkles size={18} strokeWidth={1.9} color={tokens.primary} /> - reward carrot gamification marker
Line 15: Icon = Sparkles as default - default info card icon
Line 7: Sparkles imported, used in nav icon mapping

iconAudit.notes: #539 kills Sparkles-as-AI-marker everywhere (DESIGN.md 2026-07-17 freeze replaces with Astra orbital glyph + 'AI'/'IA' badge deleted). Web Loader2 has 15 usage counts (mobile Loader2 is 0 because mobile uses ActivityIndicator from React Native instead). ListChecks + ListTodo both resolve to IconListCheck in Tabler. CheckCircle + CheckCircle2 both use IconCircleCheck (CheckCircle2 is a Lucide variant). FastForward → IconPlayerSkipForward (Tabler's skip-forward variant). Settings2 → IconSliders (Tabler equivalent for secondary settings icon). HelpCircle → IconCircleQuestion (Lucide's help icon). All 86 distinct icons plus Shuffle (custom Orbit icon). Zero icon breakage risk: all Lucide names are 1:1 renames to Icon-prefixed Tabler names except the 5 marked uncertain (which have clear Tabler equivalents but need human verification on visual parity)."

violations.detail: Line 29, 32, 35: enabled:active:scale-[0.98] violates DESIGN.md spec 'A pill scales to 0.96-0.97 on pointer-down, never lower.' Scale of 0.98 is outside the specified range.

Line 33: ghost variant uses 'bg-[var(--bg-card)]' but DESIGN.md does not define a --bg-card token. Should use semantic tokens from the defined system (--bg-elev, --bg-field, --bg-well, --bg-elev-2, --bg-sunk).
Web line 121: gap: 10 is not a multiple of 4. Should be 8 or 12.
Web line 131: padding '8px 14px' uses 14px horizontal padding, not a multiple of 4. Should be 12 or 16.
Web line 147: gap: 2 is not a multiple of 4. Should be 0, 4, 8, etc.
Web line 185: gap: 10 is not a multiple of 4. Should be 8 or 12.
Mobile line 212: paddingHorizontal: 14 is not a multiple of 4. Should be 12 or 16.
Mobile line 239: gap: 2 is not a multiple of 4. Should be 0, 4, 8, etc.
Mobile line 269: gap: 10 in trailingSlot is not a multiple of 4. Should be 8 or 12.
Line 44: bg-[var(--bg-field)] should be --bg-elev per DESIGN.md Primitives kit spec: 'radius 18, `--bg-elev` + inset hairline ring'. StatTile is a card, not a field input.
Line 44: gap-[6px] is not a multiple of 4. Should be 4 or 8.
Line 49: padding '18px 12px 16px' uses 18px top padding, not a multiple of 4. Should be 16 or 20.
Line 54: gap: 14 is not a multiple of 4. Should be 12 or 16.
Line 79: gap: 3 is not a multiple of 4. Should be 0, 4, 8, etc.
Line 110: gap: 10 is not a multiple of 4. Should be 8 or 12.
Line 176 (Switch thumb): boxShadow '0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.35)' is a custom shadow. DESIGN.md specifies exact shadows (sh-1, sh-2, sh-3). Should use sh-1 '0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.20)'.
Line 19: background 'rgba(var(--primary-rgb), 0.08)' should use --primary-dim which is rgba(primary-rgb, 0.18) per DESIGN.md. The alpha value 0.08 is incorrect.
Line 17: padding '16px 18px' uses 18px horizontal padding, not a multiple of 4. Should be 16 or 20.
Line 18: gap: 14 is not a multiple of 4. Should be 12 or 16.
Line 46: marginTop: 3 is not a multiple of 4. Should be 0, 4, 8, etc.
Web line 86: gap: 10 is not a multiple of 4. Should be 8 or 12.
Line 65: gap: 10 in fieldset is not a multiple of 4. Should be 8 or 12.
Line 47: gap: 14 (for panel rows) is not a multiple of 4. Should be 12 or 16.
Line 48: padding '14px 16px 14px ...' uses 14px top/bottom padding, not a multiple of 4. Should be 12 or 16.
Line 56: gap: 14 (for standalone rows) is not a multiple of 4. Should be 12 or 16.
Line 57: padding '14px 16px' uses 14px top/bottom padding, not a multiple of 4. Should be 12 or 16.
Line 61: marginBottom: 10 is not a multiple of 4. Should be 8 or 12.
